name: @njxqlus/jean-claude-bun-dam-sdk
description: TypeScript SDK for the Jean-Claude Bun-Dam media asset service.

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && bun build ./index.ts --target=node --format=esm --outfile ./dist/index.js && bunx tsc -p tsconfig.json --declaration --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist
scripts.check: bunx --bun @biomejs/biome check index.ts README.md package.json tsconfig.json && bunx tsc --noEmit
scripts.fix: bunx --bun @biomejs/biome check --write index.ts README.md package.json tsconfig.json
